nasb.text: Then he said, “Tomorrow.” So he said, “May it be according to your word, that you may know that there is no one like the Lord our God.

esv.text: And he said, “Tomorrow.” Moses said, “Be it as you say, so that you may know that there is no one like the Lord our God.

cnv.text: 法老說：“明天。”摩西回答：“就照著你的話行吧，好叫你知道沒有神像耶和華我們的　神。

ccb.text: 法老说：“明天。”摩西说：“就照你说的，这样你就知道没有神明能比得上我们的上帝耶和华。
